revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23989927232|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Hikawa Shrine]][[ja:氷川神社 (曖昧さ回避)]][[th:ศาลเจ้าฮิกาวะ]]
'''Hikawa Shrine''' may refer to:
* [[Hikawa Shrine (Saitama)]], the main Shinto shrine in Saitama Prefecture, which has several branch shrines, including: ''' [[Hikawa Shrine (Akasaka)]], in Akasaka, Minato, Tokyo ''' [[Hikawa Shrine (Kawagoe)]]
'''Hikawa Shrine''' (氷川神社) is a [[kami (Shinto)]] shrine dedicated to {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=draft}} as its primary deity. It is central to the {{ill|Hikawa Faith|ja|氷川信仰|12=draft}}, with over 200 shrines bearing the Hikawa name, primarily located along the {{ill|Arakawa River (Kantō)|ja|荒川 (関東)|12=draft}} in the former {{ill|Musashi Province|ja|武蔵国|12=draft}}, which includes present-day {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|12=draft}}. Including shrines without the Hikawa name, there are over 260 associated shrines, some of which are written as "簸川神社."
== Hokkaido == === Niika11u Town === * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Niika11u)|ja|氷川神社 (新冠町)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Niika11u District|ja|新冠郡|12=draft}}, {{ill|Niika11u, Hokkaido|ja|新冠町|12=draft}})
== Saitama Prefecture == === Saitama City === * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine|ja|氷川神社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ōmiya Ward|ja|大宮区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Takanohanasaka|ja|高鼻町|12=draft}}) – Head shrine of the Hikawa network. * {{ill|Hikawa-Nyojin Shrine|ja|氷川女体神社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Midori Ward (Saitama)|ja|緑区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Mimuro (Saitama)|ja|三室|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Nakayama Shrine (Saitama)|ja|中山神社 (さいたま市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Minuma Ward|ja|見沼区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nakagawa (Saitama)|ja|中川|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Bonta, Saitama)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市浦和区)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Urawa Ward|ja|浦和区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Bonta|ja|本太|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Komurada, Ōmiya)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市大宮区上小町)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ōmiya Ward|ja|大宮区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Komurada|ja|上小町|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Nishihori Hikawa Shrine|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市桜区西堀)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Sakura Ward (Saitama)|ja|桜区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nishihori (Saitama)|ja|西堀|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Tajima Hikawa Shrine|ja|田島氷川社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Sakura Ward (Saitama)|ja|桜区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tajima (Saitama)|ja|田島|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Kami-Ōkubo Hikawa Shrine|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市桜区上大久保)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Sakura Ward (Saitama)|ja|桜区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kami-Ōkubo (Saitama)|ja|上大久保|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Ōtakubo Hikawa Shrine|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市南区太田窪)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Minami Ward (Saitama)|ja|南区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōtakubo|ja|太田窪|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Futamiya, Nishi Ward)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市西区二ツ宮)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Tsuchiya, Nishi Ward)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市西区土屋)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Nishi Asuma, Nishi Ward)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市西区西遊馬)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Shimane, Nishi Ward)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市西区島根)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Takagi, Nishi Ward)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市西区高木)|12=draft}}
=== Toda City === * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Hikawa Town, Toda)|ja|氷川社 (戸田市氷川町)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Hikawa Town, Toda|ja|氷川町|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Kametoda)|ja|氷川神社 (戸田市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Kametoda|ja|上戸田|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Shimo-Toda)|ja|氷川社 (戸田市中町)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shimo-Toda|ja|下戸田|12=draft}})
=== Kawagoe City === * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Kawagoe)|ja|氷川神社 (川越市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Kawagoe|ja|川越市|12=draft}})
=== Kawaguchi City === * {{ill|Motogō Hikawa Shrine|ja|元郷氷川神社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Motogō|ja|元郷|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Chinju Hikawa Shrine|ja|鎮守氷川神社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Aoki|ja|青木|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Kami-Aoki Hikawa Shrine|ja|氷川神社 (川口市上青木)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Kami-Aoki|ja|上青木|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Nishi-Arajuku Hikawa Shrine|ja|氷川社 (川口市西新井宿)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Nishi-Arajuku|ja|西新井宿|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Higashihongi)|ja|氷川神社 (川口市鳩ヶ谷本町)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Higashihongi|ja|鳩ヶ谷本町|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Anryū)|ja|氷川神社 (川口市安行)|12=draft}}
=== Tokyo === === 23 Special Wards === ==== Bunkyō Ward ==== * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Bunkyō)|ja|簸川神社 (文京区)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Sengoku (Bunkyō)|ja|千石|12=draft}})
==== Nakano Ward ==== * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Higashinakano)|ja|氷川神社 (中野区東中野)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Higashinakano|ja|東中野|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Numabukuro)|ja|氷川神社 (中野区沼袋)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Numabukuro|ja|沼袋|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Egota)|ja|氷川神社 (中野区江古田)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Egota|ja|江古田|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Shinmei Hikawa Shrine|ja|神明氷川神社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Yayoichō (Nakano)|ja|弥生町|12=draft}})
==== Shinjuku Ward ==== * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Shinjuku)|ja|氷川神社 (新宿区)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shimo-Ochiai|ja|下落合|12=draft}})
==== Toshima Ward ==== * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Takada, Toshima)|ja|氷川神社 (豊島区高田)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Takada (Toshima)|ja|高田|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Ikebukuro Hikawa Shrine|ja|池袋氷川神社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ikebukurohonchō|ja|池袋本町|12=draft}})
== See Also == * {{ill|Hikawa Faith|ja|氷川信仰|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hikawa Maru|ja|氷川丸|12=draft}}
{{Ambox}} {{citation needed|ひかわしんしや}} {{Disambiguation}} ]]
]]
{{citation needed|Hikawa Shrine <!--Hikawa Shrine--> <!--Hikawa Shrine--> <!--Hikawa Shrine-->
[[simple:user:immanuelle/Hikawa Shrines]] <!--Hikawa Shrine-->

[[simple:user:immanuelle/Hikawa Shrines]]
{{citation needed|Hikawa Shrine}} <!--Hikawa Shrine--> <!--Hikawa Shrine--><!--Hikawa Shrine-->
[[en:Hikawa Shrines]] [[en:draft:Hikawa Shrines]] [[ja:氷川神社 (曖昧さ回避)]] [[ja:氷川神社]]
== Accidentally Overwritten Content ==
'''Hikawa Shrine''' may refer to:
* [[Hikawa Shrine (Saitama)]], the main Shinto shrine in Saitama Prefecture, which has several branch shrines, including: ''' [[Hikawa Shrine (Akasaka)]], in Akasaka, Minato, Tokyo ''' [[Hikawa Shrine (Kawagoe)]]
'''Hikawa Shrine''' (氷川神社) is a [[kami (Shinto)]] shrine dedicated to {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=draft}} as its primary deity. It is central to the {{ill|Hikawa Faith|ja|氷川信仰|12=draft}}, with over 200 shrines bearing the Hikawa name, primarily located along the {{ill|Arakawa River (Kantō)|ja|荒川 (関東)|12=draft}} in the former {{ill|Musashi Province|ja|武蔵国|12=draft}}, which includes present-day {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|12=draft}}. Including shrines without the Hikawa name, there are over 260 associated shrines, some of which are written as "簸川神社."
== Hokkaido == === Niika11u Town === * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Niika11u)|ja|氷川神社 (新冠町)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Niika11u District|ja|新冠郡|12=draft}}, {{ill|Niika11u, Hokkaido|ja|新冠町|12=draft}})
== Saitama Prefecture == === Saitama City === * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine|ja|氷川神社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ōmiya Ward|ja|大宮区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Takanohanasaka|ja|高鼻町|12=draft}}) – Head shrine of the Hikawa network. * {{ill|Hikawa-Nyojin Shrine|ja|氷川女体神社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Midori Ward (Saitama)|ja|緑区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Mimuro (Saitama)|ja|三室|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Nakayama Shrine (Saitama)|ja|中山神社 (さいたま市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Minuma Ward|ja|見沼区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nakagawa (Saitama)|ja|中川|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Bonta, Saitama)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市浦和区)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Urawa Ward|ja|浦和区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Bonta|ja|本太|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Komurada, Ōmiya)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市大宮区上小町)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ōmiya Ward|ja|大宮区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Komurada|ja|上小町|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Nishihori Hikawa Shrine|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市桜区西堀)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Sakura Ward (Saitama)|ja|桜区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nishihori (Saitama)|ja|西堀|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Tajima Hikawa Shrine|ja|田島氷川社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Sakura Ward (Saitama)|ja|桜区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tajima (Saitama)|ja|田島|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Kami-Ōkubo Hikawa Shrine|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市桜区上大久保)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Sakura Ward (Saitama)|ja|桜区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kami-Ōkubo (Saitama)|ja|上大久保|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Ōtakubo Hikawa Shrine|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市南区太田窪)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Minami Ward (Saitama)|ja|南区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōtakubo|ja|太田窪|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Futamiya, Nishi Ward)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市西区二ツ宮)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Tsuchiya, Nishi Ward)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市西区土屋)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Nishi Asuma, Nishi Ward)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市西区西遊馬)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Shimane, Nishi Ward)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市西区島根)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Takagi, Nishi Ward)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市西区高木)|12=draft}}
=== Toda City === * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Hikawa Town, Toda)|ja|氷川社 (戸田市氷川町)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Hikawa Town, Toda|ja|氷川町|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Kametoda)|ja|氷川神社 (戸田市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Kametoda|ja|上戸田|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Shimo-Toda)|ja|氷川社 (戸田市中町)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shimo-Toda|ja|下戸田|12=draft}})
=== Kawagoe City === * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Kawagoe)|ja|氷川神社 (川越市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Kawagoe|ja|川越市|12=draft}})
=== Kawaguchi City === * {{ill|Motogō Hikawa Shrine|ja|元郷氷川神社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Motogō|ja|元郷|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Chinju Hikawa Shrine|ja|鎮守氷川神社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Aoki|ja|青木|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Kami-Aoki Hikawa Shrine|ja|氷川神社 (川口市上青木)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Kami-Aoki|ja|上青木|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Nishi-Arajuku Hikawa Shrine|ja|氷川社 (川口市西新井宿)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Nishi-Arajuku|ja|西新井宿|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Higashihongi)|ja|氷川神社 (川口市鳩ヶ谷本町)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Higashihongi|ja|鳩ヶ谷本町|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Anryū)|ja|氷川神社 (川口市安行)|12=draft}}
=== Tokyo === === 23 Special Wards === ==== Bunkyō Ward ==== * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Bunkyō)|ja|簸川神社 (文京区)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Sengoku (Bunkyō)|ja|千石|12=draft}})
==== Nakano Ward ==== * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Higashinakano)|ja|氷川神社 (中野区東中野)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Higashinakano|ja|東中野|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Numabukuro)|ja|氷川神社 (中野区沼袋)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Numabukuro|ja|沼袋|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Egota)|ja|氷川神社 (中野区江古田)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Egota|ja|江古田|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Shinmei Hikawa Shrine|ja|神明氷川神社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Yayoichō (Nakano)|ja|弥生町|12=draft}})
==== Shinjuku Ward ==== * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Shinjuku)|ja|氷川神社 (新宿区)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shimo-Ochiai|ja|下落合|12=draft}})

== See Also == * {{ill|Hikawa Faith|ja|氷川信仰|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hikawa Maru|ja|氷川丸|12=draft}}

]]

== Accidentally Overwritten Content ==
'''Hikawa Shrine''' may refer to:
* [[Hikawa Shrine (Saitama)]], the main Shinto shrine in Saitama Prefecture, which has several branch shrines, including: ''' [[Hikawa Shrine (Akasaka)]], in Akasaka, Minato, Tokyo ''' [[Hikawa Shrine (Kawagoe)]]
'''Hikawa Shrine''' (氷川神社) is a [[kami (Shinto)]] shrine dedicated to {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|ja|素戔嗚尊|12=draft}} as its primary deity. It is central to the {{ill|Hikawa Faith|ja|氷川信仰|12=draft}}, with over 200 shrines bearing the Hikawa name, primarily located along the {{ill|Arakawa River (Kantō)|ja|荒川 (関東)|12=draft}} in the former {{ill|Musashi Province|ja|武蔵国|12=draft}}, which includes present-day {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県|12=draft}} and {{ill|Tokyo|ja|東京都|12=draft}}. Including shrines without the Hikawa name, there are over 260 associated shrines, some of which are written as "簸川神社."
== Hokkaido == === Niika11u Town === * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Niika11u)|ja|氷川神社 (新冠町)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Niika11u District|ja|新冠郡|12=draft}}, {{ill|Niika11u, Hokkaido|ja|新冠町|12=draft}})
== Saitama Prefecture == === Saitama City === * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine|ja|氷川神社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ōmiya Ward|ja|大宮区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Takanohanasaka|ja|高鼻町|12=draft}}) – Head shrine of the Hikawa network. * {{ill|Hikawa-Nyojin Shrine|ja|氷川女体神社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Midori Ward (Saitama)|ja|緑区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Mimuro (Saitama)|ja|三室|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Nakayama Shrine (Saitama)|ja|中山神社 (さいたま市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Minuma Ward|ja|見沼区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nakagawa (Saitama)|ja|中川|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Bonta, Saitama)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市浦和区)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Urawa Ward|ja|浦和区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Bonta|ja|本太|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Komurada, Ōmiya)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市大宮区上小町)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ōmiya Ward|ja|大宮区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Komurada|ja|上小町|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Nishihori Hikawa Shrine|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市桜区西堀)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Sakura Ward (Saitama)|ja|桜区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Nishihori (Saitama)|ja|西堀|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Tajima Hikawa Shrine|ja|田島氷川社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Sakura Ward (Saitama)|ja|桜区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Tajima (Saitama)|ja|田島|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Kami-Ōkubo Hikawa Shrine|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市桜区上大久保)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Sakura Ward (Saitama)|ja|桜区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Kami-Ōkubo (Saitama)|ja|上大久保|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Ōtakubo Hikawa Shrine|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市南区太田窪)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Minami Ward (Saitama)|ja|南区|12=draft}}, {{ill|Ōtakubo|ja|太田窪|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Futamiya, Nishi Ward)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市西区二ツ宮)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Tsuchiya, Nishi Ward)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市西区土屋)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Nishi Asuma, Nishi Ward)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市西区西遊馬)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Shimane, Nishi Ward)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市西区島根)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Takagi, Nishi Ward)|ja|氷川神社 (さいたま市西区高木)|12=draft}}
=== Toda City === * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Hikawa Town, Toda)|ja|氷川社 (戸田市氷川町)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Hikawa Town, Toda|ja|氷川町|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Kametoda)|ja|氷川神社 (戸田市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Kametoda|ja|上戸田|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Shimo-Toda)|ja|氷川社 (戸田市中町)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shimo-Toda|ja|下戸田|12=draft}})
=== Kawagoe City === * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Kawagoe)|ja|氷川神社 (川越市)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Kawagoe|ja|川越市|12=draft}})
=== Kawaguchi City === * {{ill|Motogō Hikawa Shrine|ja|元郷氷川神社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Motogō|ja|元郷|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Chinju Hikawa Shrine|ja|鎮守氷川神社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Aoki|ja|青木|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Kami-Aoki Hikawa Shrine|ja|氷川神社 (川口市上青木)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Kami-Aoki|ja|上青木|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Nishi-Arajuku Hikawa Shrine|ja|氷川社 (川口市西新井宿)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Nishi-Arajuku|ja|西新井宿|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Higashihongi)|ja|氷川神社 (川口市鳩ヶ谷本町)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Higashihongi|ja|鳩ヶ谷本町|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Anryū)|ja|氷川神社 (川口市安行)|12=draft}}
=== Tokyo === === 23 Special Wards === ==== Bunkyō Ward ==== * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Bunkyō)|ja|簸川神社 (文京区)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Sengoku (Bunkyō)|ja|千石|12=draft}})
==== Nakano Ward ==== * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Higashinakano)|ja|氷川神社 (中野区東中野)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Higashinakano|ja|東中野|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Numabukuro)|ja|氷川神社 (中野区沼袋)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Numabukuro|ja|沼袋|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Egota)|ja|氷川神社 (中野区江古田)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Egota|ja|江古田|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Shinmei Hikawa Shrine|ja|神明氷川神社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Yayoichō (Nakano)|ja|弥生町|12=draft}})
==== Shinjuku Ward ==== * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Shinjuku)|ja|氷川神社 (新宿区)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Shimo-Ochiai|ja|下落合|12=draft}})
==== Toshima Ward ==== * {{ill|Hikawa Shrine (Takada, Toshima)|ja|氷川神社 (豊島区高田)|12=draft}} ({{ill|Takada (Toshima)|ja|高田|12=draft}}) * {{ill|Ikebukuro Hikawa Shrine|ja|池袋氷川神社|12=draft}} ({{ill|Ikebukurohonchō|ja|池袋本町|12=draft}})
== See Also == * {{ill|Hikawa Faith|ja|氷川信仰|12=draft}} * {{ill|Hikawa Maru|ja|氷川丸|12=draft}}
